headline: Biotech Bigwigs ABBV, JNJ, BIIB & LLY Hit New 52-Week Highs
summary: LLY, ABBV, BIIB and JNJ hit new 52-week highs as biotech rallies, with company-specific pipeline, approvals and deal activity adding momentum.

raw.headline: Biotech Bigwigs ABBV, JNJ, BIIB & LLY Hit New 52-Week Highs
raw.summary: LLY, ABBV, BIIB and JNJ hit new 52-week highs as biotech rallies, with company-specific pipeline, approvals and deal activity adding momentum.

headline: Biogen (BIIB) Moves 7.0% Higher: Will This Strength Last?
summary: Biogen (BIIB) was a big mover last session on higher-than-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions might not help the stock continue moving higher in the near term.

raw.headline: Biogen (BIIB) Moves 7.0% Higher: Will This Strength Last?
raw.summary: Biogen (BIIB) was a big mover last session on higher-than-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions might not help the stock continue moving higher in the near term.

headline: Biogen trims Apellis pipeline and R&D team after $5.6bn takeover
summary: The pharma company plans to pause or terminate investment in most of Apellis’ legacy research programmes.

raw.headline: Biogen trims Apellis pipeline and R&D team after $5.6bn takeover
raw.summary: The pharma company plans to pause or terminate investment in most of Apellis’ legacy research programmes.

headline: Biogen to Highlight Breadth of Alzheimer’s Disease Portfolio at AAIC 2026, Including Phase 2 CELIA Data for Diranersen
summary: Diranersen presentation will feature Phase 2 CELIA data in early Alzheimer’s disease, including clinical, biomarker and safety results for Biogen’s investigational tau-targeting ASO, following topline results announced in May 2026Lecanemab presentations will highlight emerging data on subcutaneous administration and real-world use, including practical treatment considerations, at-home administration, three-year LEADER data, maintenance dosing and patient experienceAdvances across Biogen’s Alzhei

headline: Needham Maintains Buy on Biogen, Raises Price Target to $256
summary: Needham  analyst Ami Fadia   maintains Biogen (NASDAQ:BIIB) with a Buy and raises the price target from $255 to $256.
